creator: larry@cybent.net
text:
After upgrading linux base port from fc6 to f8 (no problems during install) linux programs ceased to work correctly. After starting linux program it spawns 2 processess that eat up all CPU time (spending most of it in system, not user).
Tried skype and linux-opera. Skype just halts after showing initial window, opera work as usual but anyway waste CPU time same way.

How-To-Repeat: Install linux_base-f8 under same OS release, run linux app.
